parsed_review.summary: CP00-616 (RP20 Data Room And VDR P02 fixture-tail/test-head, Risk A, 10 units, range RP20.P02.M06.S15-RP20.P02.M07.S02) passes independent read-only review with zero findings. Verified through Read/Grep/Glob only (no Bash, no edits, no writes, no connectors). (1) Coverage: registry decomposes the pack as RP20.P02.M06 = P02_SERVICE_REVIEW_ROWS.slice(14) = 8 rows (approval_required_routing, blocked_claim_output, rollback_behavior, retry_behavior, unit_test happy/denied/review, integration_smoke_case) and RP20.P02.M07 = P02_SERVICE_ROWS.slice(0,2) = 2 rows (service_entrypoint_contract, request_normalization) = 10 units / 2 sections. This is continuous with CP615 (which covered M06 rows 0-13) with no overlap or gap, and the handoff routes to CP00-617 / RP20.P02.M07.S03. (2) Distribution: deliverable counts {ui:1, implementation:2, failure_recovery:2, test:4, contract:1} and micro-title counts {Synthetic Fixture Set:8, Test And Golden Case Set:2} are identical across the registry DELIVERABLE_COUNTS constant, requirements expected_deliverable_counts, manifest delivery_counts, the hand-mapped manifest included_units, the contract cp616_requirements projection, and the prompt baseline. (3) No-write/no-real-data: freezeCp616Result freezes a descriptor with ~40 runtime/dispatch/write/permission/audit/storage/no-leak flags all false (including CP616-specific executes_fixture_tail_runtime and executes_test_golden_case_runtime), synthetic_only/no_real_data true, customer_safe_errors_only true; validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp616P02FixtureTailTestHeadDescriptor asserts every flag false plus the authority boundary; no filesystem, network, DB, or process I/O exists in any source/test/validator — they are pure frozen-object builders. (4) Tests assert covered_units 10, section_count 2, deliverable_counts deepEqual, production_ready_candidate true, all execute_* false, no_write_attestation reference-equality, hermes emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false, claude_is_final_approval false, handoff to CP00-617/RP20.P02.M07.S03, and deepEqual of contract.projections.cp616_{pack_binding,requirements,no_write_attestation} and contract.packs.cp616_p02_fixture_tail_test_head_descriptor against generated code; the contract validator script re-runs all of these assertions. (5) Contract and live plan are consistent: program block current_pack_id CP00-616 / next CP00-617 / current_range matches; manifest status in_progress, production_ready false, runtime_ready false, implementation_layer descriptor, deviation_from_plan false. (6) Authority boundary holds: Claude is read_only_independent_reviewer and never final approver, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob, CP178+ forbidden_review_evidence wired into the claude packet. (7) Hermes appears only as descriptor evidence-packet/receipt-shape metadata with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false (no product runtime embedding). CP178+ hardening evidence is sound: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1469-byte non-empty valid-JSON stdout); the pending_review states in claude-review-result.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md and the empty command-evidence matrix are by-design placeholders for this read_only_claude_run_raw_capture step (downstream normalize/receipt_validate/adjudication/inspection/final_closeout_validation populate them), not defects; unrelated dirty/untracked files (progress-control-room, workbook/matter docs, new-session-handoff) are correctly excluded from active_pack_implementation_refs with active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted empty. The pack correctly holds production_ready/runtime_ready false at the descriptor layer and weakens no production_ready gate.
